LXCat, www.lxcat.net
Generated on 07 Jan 2026. All rights reserved.

RECOMMENDED REFERENCE FORMAT
- Maxwellian (nu=const) test database, custom cross section for constant collision frequency.

CROSS SECTION DATA FORMAT
Custom elastic cross section designed to ensure constant collision frequency nu = N*sigma*v = const.
This is achieved by making sigma(v) proportional to 1/v.
Note: This configuration results in a Maxwellian distribution, not a Druyvesteyn distribution.

********************************************************** H2 **********************************************************

ELASTIC
H2
 2.743480e-4
SPECIES: e / H2
PROCESS: E + H2 -> E + H2, Elastic (Maxwellian nu=const test)
PARAM.:  m/M = 0.000274348, sigma(v) proportional to 1/v
COMMENT: [E + H2(X) -> E + H2(X), Elastic] Custom cross section for Maxwellian (nu=const) test.
COMMENT: Designed to ensure constant collision frequency nu = N * sigma * v = const.
COMMENT: Results in a Maxwellian distribution, not Druyvesteyn.
UPDATED: 2026-01-07 18:09:58
